what: Transformations keep the call as the name (M1)
title: Design Notes
text: log(x) stays log(x) — term’s name full call, formulas rebuild losslessly without mesa needing re-apply anything. wrapper additionally recorded transformation field downstream layers (e.g. set_data(), future table labeling) can interpret . factor()/ordered() wrappers make set_data() classify term converted variable.

what: The parser is an AST walk (M1)
title: Design Notes
text: tm.formula() walks formula’s syntax tree (collect_formula_terms()) instead scanning .names() positionally. Consequences worth remembering: Nested runes now work: .x(log(x)) exposure log transformation. Unrecognized calls (Surv(...), cluster(...)) opaque terms, carried whole. Group tiers accept number digits (.g10). .()/.m() shortcuts demote (warning) exposure exists; explicit :b products keep interaction role silently.

title: Design Notes

title: Design Notes
text: Five decisions, made together start M6 (full specification subtask 6.1 extends entry): Two-stage grammar. intermediate table-specification object sits model collection rendered table: mesa() constructs , composable verbs refine , as_gt() renders . constructor named mesa() (namesake act laying models table), tbl(), collide dplyr::tbl(). Revised (July 2026): grammar deliverable committed API. tbl_* monoliths end-points preserve — table shapes survive named layout presets ("adjustment", "levels", "interaction"), functions deprecated deleted 6.7/6.9 signature-compatibility work. earlier phrasing (“one-shot call patterns keep working”) withdrawn: tables grown iteration composition, pre-specified recipe. Composition configuration. mesa(object) takes selection arguments; everything else arrives one decision time pipeable verbs (select_*, modify_labels(), add_*, modify_*), optional defaulting sensibly, table grown iteratively way ggplot2 plot (staying pipe, +). make safe, spec declarative lazily resolved: verbs record instructions, resolution mdl_tbl happens spec realized print() as_gt(). Consequences: verb order irrelevant, repeating verb replaces earlier instruction message (ggplot scale-replacement behavior), relabeling late never requires reselecting. Attached data canonical. dataList attribute mdl_tbl single source data-derived statistics (events, person-years, per-level n, factor levels, reference levels). Table functions need data find error pointer attach_data(). Revised (July 2026): recipes demoted, data = argument anywhere table layer — attach_data() single path, every data-needing error points . Forest plots column type, separate table family: table specification can include forest column block, interaction-forest shape reduces interaction rows + forest column. Verb naming follows gtsummary precedent. Column verbs use add_*; remaining spec fields adjusted modify_layout() / modify_style(). Revised (July 2026): earlier decision “recipe family keeps tbl_* prefix” moot now recipes committed surface. one-call convenience ever proves worth shipping, ships documented grammar chain (preset plus column verbs), new tbl_* API.

text: Every table reduces one cell frame, as_gt() consumes nothing else. long tibble, one row per rendered cell — , per (row, displayed column) pair, “displayed column” single finished box (estimate--CI like 1.4 (1.1, 1.8) one cell, three): as_gt() mechanical lives one place: (1) expand named statistic inside value working column keyed column_key__stat pivot wide, row_group → groupname_col row_key → rowname_col; (2) fmt_number() format$digits; (3) cols_merge() column_key’s working columns back one displayed column via format$pattern; (4) tab_spanner() spanner, cols_label() column_label; (5) apply accents theme. canonical form tibble, testing table testing tibble — snapshot tests compare cell frames, rendered HTML (makes 6.10 tractable). Two mechanisms extend mechanical pipeline live renderer: rowspan emulation group-scoped cells drawing plot cells — specified next, existing precisely cell frame can stay plain data.

title: Design Notes
text: statistics belong term, one levels. interaction p-value canonical case: estimate_interaction() returns one p_value across levels, old tbl_interaction_forest() displayed floating two level rows — implemented duplicate--white-hack (value written every level row, one masked white zero-size text, survivor vertically aligned onto band’s seam). spec makes first-class concept instead. rule, stated : statistic computed across term’s levels attaches term, placement follows levels sit. levels columns ("levels" layout), term-scoped statistic gets displayed column — rate difference already works way. levels rows ("interaction" layout), becomes group-scoped cell: row_scope = "group", row_key = NA, row_group set term’s band, one cell per (group, column). Rendering group-scoped cells renderer’s job alone, gt rowspan body cells: as_gt() emulates one writing value row group, keeping visible exactly one row, vertically centered band (two level rows: rendered first row v_align = "bottom", makes float seam), masking duplicates (white text, zero size, borders suppressed). mask never appears cell frame — render artifact, data. gt ever grows body rowspans, as_gt() changes. Term-scoped statistics launch: interaction p_value (inside interaction block) rate_difference. future across-levels statistic inherits rule rather inventing placement.

title: The {mesa} Blueprint
text: Every table five stages; four monoliths differ options pick stage. stage becomes pure internal function, every preset path : Select — models (outcomes, exposures, adjustment sets, strata) terms, chosen labeled formulas. Decorate — join estimate row term metadata: role label term table, factor levels reference level attached data, level_labels overrides. Compute — optional statistics beyond coefficients: n, events rates person-years, rate differences, interaction effect estimates. Layout — assign content four axes reduce cell frame, tidy tibble one row per table cell (row_key, column_key, group, spanner, value, fmt). Render — translate cell frame gt calls; nothing stage touches gt. four axes (vocabulary governs every table; issues #47, #48): <mesa> specification object declarative: carries instructions, results — selection (models terms, recorded select_* verbs), labels (term, level, column relabelings), columns (ordered list column blocks, type, statistics, labels, format), layout (axis assignment), style (accents, digits, missing text). Resolution — running selection mdl_tbl, decorating metadata, computing data statistics — happens spec realized print() as_gt(), makes verb order irrelevant late overrides cheap. verb families: Composition rules: every verb optional defaults sensibly (bare mesa(mt) |> as_gt() renders estimate + CI everything fitted); verbs may arrive order; repeating verb replaces earlier instruction message (ggplot2 scale-replacement behavior). iteration looks like: constructor named mesa() — laying models mesa package’s namesake act — tbl(), collide dplyr::tbl(). File layout work lands: R/table-spec.R (constructor, print, validation), R/table-columns.R (add_* verbs), R/table-render.R (as_gt(), file importing gt layout functions), R/table-presets.R (layout presets , last, deprecated tbl_* shims); R/gt.R keeps shared argument documentation theme_gt_compact(); gt-beta.R, gt-survival.R, gt-forest.R retire presets reproduce tables.

Done — see “table grammar specification (M6.1)” DESIGN.md. fixes four axes (rows, row groups, columns, spanners), cell frame (long tibble as_gt() consumes), statistics vocabulary attached-data requirements, three launch presets ("adjustment", "levels", "interaction") combinations error deferred past launch. Revised July 2026 follow-review, three places: (1) cell frame gained row_scope ("row"/"group"), statistic computed across term’s levels — interaction p-value visually floats two level rows old forest table — first-class data rather duplicate--white-hack; (2) forest block pinned render-time — forest cells hold plain numbers, shared x-scale column property resolved across cells, bottom axis strip reserved .axis row sorted last, block’s dense-padding/borderless look enters style defaults modify_style() can override — adding forest column never changes cell; (3) presets decoupled tbl_* function names — shapes committed, functions . 6.2 selection resolver. Term levels (cyl6, cyl8) resolve term table’s variable–level relationship — stamped attached data via set_data(), since fit pipeline leaves levels empty — categorical term expands bare name plus one key per non-reference level, match_term_keys() maps tidy names back variables identity. Adjustment-set identity sequential model index within outcome × exposure (× strata × subset × data) family (family_adjustment_index()), ordered adjustment degree row-order tie-breaking, colliding term counts stay distinct. selection input flows one mechanism (selection_input() → labeled_formulas_to_named_list()); unresolvable selections error clearly rather half-working. Tests test-table-selection.R cover adversarial names (/gam, wt/wt2), categorical level resolution, colliding term counts, per-stratum adjustment numbering, order-independence, error paths. 6.3 <mesa> specification, constructor, selection verbs. mesa(object) deliberately bare: validates — mdl_tbl , fitted rows , single model family per table (error), single dataset (message) — puts everything fitted mesa default labels term table attached data. select_* verbs modify_labels() record instructions spec; resolution deferred realization, compose order repeated verb replaces instruction message. Realization decorates selected rows role, label, level, reference-level metadata, injects reference rows categorical terms (generalizing tbl_beta’s _ref logic); data-derived metadata comes dataList, missing error points attach_data(). print() shows mesa — models, declared axes, column blocks far — iterating means printing, adjusting one verb, printing . as_gt() bare spec renders minimal default table (estimate + CI), grammar usable first verb. Tests assert order-independence: permutation verbs realizes table. 6.4 Model-statistic columns. add_estimates(columns = list(beta ~ ..., conf ~ ..., p ~ ...), exponentiate = NULL, digits = 2): estimate/CI/p blocks, exponentiation deferred M5 family inference default (corrects hazard-scale defect); add_n() recorded nobs. verb appends column block instructions; computation formatting happen realization, re-calling verb replaces block message. 6.5 Data-statistic columns. add_events(followup, person_years = 100): events incidence rates per term level via survival::pyears() (Suggests-guarded) attached data, resolved models’ data_id. add_rate_difference(conf_level = 0.95) completes issue #30: correct critical value (qnorm(0.975)), person_years honored, restricted dichotomous terms actual level-count check. Rate difference term-scoped statistic (computed across two levels): "levels" layout occupies column, per group-scoped-cell rule 6.1 spec. data = argument anywhere table layer — attach_data() single path, every data-needing error points . 6.6 renderer. as_gt(x): reduce column blocks layout cell frame, pivot, emit gt calls — spanners, column merges pattern, labels, stub indentation, alignment, missing text — one place; theme_gt_compact() remains compatible. Two mechanisms live (per 6.1 spec): group-scoped cells (row_scope = "group") emulated — gt body-cell rowspan — writing value row group, keeping exactly one visible vertically centered band, masking duplicates (old forest table’s white-trick, now documented one place); type = "plot" cells drawn numeric values, forest column shares one x-scale computed across cells, reserved .axis row emitted last. modify_style(accents, digits, missing_text) generalizes accents machinery: criteria statistic (p < 0.05, estimate > 1), instructions beyond bold (italic, color), applied render. 6.7 presets prove grammar (monoliths retire).
